title: TSMM Evidence Artifact Extension v0.9.0
description: Extension schema for typed evidence artifacts produced by operational systems, authorized actors, and assessment processes in TSMM-aligned trust systems. Specializes the core Evidence abstraction with production context, artifact type, and traceability fields.

artifactType.description: The class of evidence this artifact represents. Determines how downstream assessors and verifiers should interpret and process it.

producedBy.description: Reference to the Actor, system, or process that generated this artifact.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime string recording when the artifact was produced.

evidenceHash.description: Integrity anchor for the artifact content. Supports tamper detection and chain-of-custody claims.

verificationMethod.description: How this artifact should be verified. Examples: schema-validation, signature-check, human-review.

relatedPolicy.description: Reference to the Policy whose evaluation this artifact supports or was produced under.

relatedAction.description: Reference to an Action (agentic extension concept) that this artifact traces. Populated when the artifact is produced in an agentic execution context.

supportsRefs.description: References to the Claims, Controls, Requirements, Assessments, or Verifications that this artifact substantiates.
